selectionPolicy: Sort READY work by priorityScore descending, then no blockers, smallest safe scope, validation availability, and lease compatibility.

readyWork.title: Run fresh repository production-readiness audit
readyWork.scope: Run a fresh audit from current repository sources and validators; produce current risks and first implementation slices.
readyWork.nonGoals: Do not claim production readiness or change product behavior during audit-only work.
acceptanceCriteria: Current findings cite source files or commands.
Findings are converted into READY, BACKLOG, or BLOCKED queue items.
Memory receives only fresh verified facts.

readyWork.title: Refresh Salesforce and competitor parity matrix
readyWork.scope: Use current sources to update product parity and convert gaps into scored implementation slices.
readyWork.nonGoals: Do not make unsupported parity claims or copy long external content.
acceptanceCriteria: Matrix has dated sources and separates facts from inference.
Gaps are scored and routed to backlog items.
Beginner, advanced, and admin modes are considered.

readyWork.title: Audit 10 lakh send readiness and load evidence gaps
readyWork.scope: Audit campaign, audience, delivery, tracking, Kafka, provider rate, warmup, and observability paths for bounded high-volume operation.
readyWork.nonGoals: Do not bypass warmup, suppression, unsubscribe, rate control, provider health, or inbox safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Findings identify measured evidence gaps separately from code gaps.
Implementation candidates are chunked into safe slices.
Throughput claims remain blocked unless evidence exists.
readyWork.nextAction: Run a high-volume performance pass and refine executable findings.

blockedWork.title: Collect strict production release evidence
blockedWork.scope: Collect real target evidence for release promotion.
blockedWork.nonGoals: Do not replace production evidence with local-only checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Image, GA, egress, restore, monitoring, TLS/admission, CI/security, and load evidence are present.
blockers: External evidence not present in repository
blockedWork.nextAction: Collect external evidence, then run strict release gate.
